productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Brown Formal Shoes
description: Smooth leather slip-ons from red tape for men with a refined, stacked heel, perfectly designed for the debonair who pushes the sartorial envelope as much as he can. The stitch detail on the upper is balanced with a sleek silhouetting. Style this with flat front trousers, a tonal blazer and a crisp shirt. Upper Smooth leather upper with reinforced overlay on the heel Suede overlay on the toe box Slip on styling with elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for ease of wearability Soft sockliner for instep comfort Brand badge on the lateral side of the midfoot Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPU outsole with a stacked heel Textured grooves on the forefoot for grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not machine wash
